codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the feature requirements: startup WARN logs were added for default DSN fallback, sslmode=disable, and auto-generated master keys, with actionable remediation guidance. Added tests verify warning emission and no-warning behavior for secure configurations. One non-blocking test robustness concern is noted.

issues.description: TestLoadOrCreateMasterKey_AutoGenerate_EmitsWarning assumes /etc/kindling/master.key is absent. In environments where SystemMasterKeyPath exists, LoadOrCreateMasterKey() will load the existing key and emit no warning, causing this test to fail for environment-specific reasons. Consider skipping when SystemMasterKeyPath exists (as DSN tests already do for SystemDSNPath) or otherwise isolating system-path access.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The security-backend-worker skill prescribes RED-first TDD (write failing tests before implementation), but this run implemented code changes before creating the new security test file, while handoff.skillFeedback still marked followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl skeleton for session f0bace99-333a-4033-af97-c02abd59bc6d shows Tool: Edit on internal/bootstrap/dsn.go and internal/bootstrap/masterkey.go before Tool: Create for internal/bootstrap/bootstrap_security_test.go; first package test run for new tests occurs after implementation edits.

summary: Review result: pass. The feature implementation fulfills VAL-OPSEC-001/002/003 with appropriate warnings and remediation text, and includes solid positive/negative test coverage. No blocking correctness or security issues were found.
